title: PneumaticCraft: No Loot
description: Remove annoying PneumaticCraft loot from chests
body:
# Summary
Are you tired of [PneumaticCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized) loot appearing all over chest loot? Are you annoyed by how easy it is to obtain Guided Missile, which is OP in PVP, or Compressed Iron Armor, which is better than iron armor, but can be found in almost any chest? You can skip many essential steps in PneumaticCraft progression, such as creating your first Compressed Iron via explosion, or building your first Pressure chamber, just by looting.

If you are tired of those things, then this datapack is for you.

I recommend using mod like [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader) alongside this datapack.

## Now available as a mod!
Versions the mod is available on:
- ✓ 1.18.2
- ✗ 1.19.x
- ✗ 1.20.1
- ✗ 1.20.4
- ✗ 1.21-1.21.1

# Demonstration of how the datapack works
![Simple demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae49c2491844f69749a673db35151892a0fd9784.png)
